primary_sources.use: Ed25519 signature semantics and verification boundary
independent witness model for transparency checkpoints

finding: Authenticated checkpoints require a separate deny-by-default multi-witness acceptance policy. A quorum must count unique configured witnesses, reject stale or future observations, verify the underlying signed checkpoint, and fail on equal-size divergent roots.
design_implication: Peer-trigger evidence can be accepted only when a configured number of unique trusted witnesses agree on the same authenticated checkpoint within a bounded observation window. Agreement is recorded as authenticated_multi_witness_agreement, not as proof of checkpoint truth or global non-equivocation.

verification.route: isolated Node 22 test run using byte-identical module and test content plus the committed R-009 verifier interface
cases: fresh unique trusted witnesses reaching quorum
equal-size divergent roots classified as equivocation

claim_states.observed: R-009 authenticated individual checkpoints and detected pairwise equivocation but did not define quorum acceptance.
claim_states.implemented: Deny-by-default quorum evaluation with witness uniqueness, freshness, trust allowlist, signed-checkpoint verification, and equal-size divergence detection.
claim_states.inferred: Multiple independently operated witnesses reduce reliance on one observer, but configured identity diversity does not establish operational independence.
claim_states.proposed: Add signer-key rotation, witness-key authentication, revocation, and a portable equivocation packet.
claim_states.unresolved: Witness operational independence, key custody, revocation distribution, clock trust, network partition behavior, and exact-commit CI execution.

falsification_route: Reject acceptance if fewer than minimum_witnesses unique configured witnesses agree.
Reject stale, future, malformed, untrusted, or duplicate witness records.
Reject any checkpoint whose Ed25519 signature fails or whose signer is outside the trusted signer map.
Classify equal tree sizes with different roots as equivocation.
Do not infer global consistency, payload truth, or witness independence from quorum acceptance.
limits: The local test used a generated Ed25519 key and simulated witness records. No distributed witnesses, external clocks, production keys, network partitions, or GitHub Actions run were observed.
